scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=apps/web" "npm run dev --workspace=backend" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/worker"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=apps/web && npm run build --workspace=backend && npm run build --workspace=apps/worker
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start --workspace=apps/web" "npm run start --workspace=backend" "npm run start --workspace=apps/worker"
